role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic evidence (no signs/scripts) and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation types, and road construction style.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Musa/banana) and scrubland composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure standards (concrete slabs, block barriers) and markings.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (infrastructure style + image quality) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the Philippines. The specialists provided grounded, image-specific evidence (concrete barriers, banana plants) and the tournament effectively used this evidence to eliminate competitors.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of scrubland, rolling hills, and concrete barriers match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified banana plants and secondary growth visible in the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the concrete slab road and block barriers.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly linked the visual infrastructure style to the region.
